exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Was 75x8,8,8 @RPE9 - hold. Hip hinge, neutral spine, bar close. This trains the posterior chain that fixes your anterior tilt - brace hard, no rounding at the bottom.

exercises.name: Pull-Up Parallel Close Grip
exercises.notes: Was 6,6,6,6 @RPE10 - all clean 6s last time, held bodyweight. Same target; if all 4 sets hit 6 at RPE<=8 we add a light weight next B.

exercises.name: Machine Seated Row
exercises.notes: Was 25x10,10,8 @RPE10 (last set failed) - hold 25, get 10 clean across before adding. Squeeze shoulder blades, no torso swing.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Was 30x12,12,12 @RPE10 - hold weight, target dropped to 10 (last was max-effort). Strict.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Was 40x15,15,15 @RPE9 - hold. Posture/rear delt - high elbows, pull to forehead. Keep this honest, it directly helps the upper-back side of your posture work.

exercises.name: Box Situp
exercises.notes: Skipped last B (time - did cable crunch instead). Do it today: feet supported, controlled extension over the box, NO ballistic hyperextension. Stop if lower back complains.

exercises.name: Machine Preacher Curl (drop set)
exercises.notes: ONE triple-drop set, no rest between drops. Start 30kg to failure (12 last time) -> drop ~25kg to failure -> drop ~20kg to failure. Bicep finisher.
